bundles.title: Gate Record Foundation
bundles.goal: Define GateRecord as the canonical persistence model and replace the legacy interaction store at the data-layer boundary.
outputs: GateRecord, GatePayload, GateKind, GateStatus, and GateRecordStore TypeScript contracts
LocalFsGateRecordStore on .specflow/runs/<run_id>/records/
FakeGateRecordStore test double
unit tests for read, write, list, and atomic single-record persistence behavior

tasks.title: Define GateKind, GateStatus, GatePayload, GateRecord, and GateRecordStore and remove the individual delete API from the contract
Implement LocalFsGateRecordStore with write-to-temp plus rename semantics while preserving the existing records/ directory layout and gate_id filename mapping
Add FakeGateRecordStore for runtime and transition tests
Add unit coverage for read, write, list, no-delete behavior, and atomic persistence guarantees

bundles.title: Legacy Record Migration
bundles.goal: Provide an idempotent migration and rollback path from legacy approval and clarify records to GateRecord JSON.
outputs: specflow-migrate-records CLI
.migrated sentinel and .backup snapshot behavior
UnmigratedRecordError read-path enforcement
migration fixtures and idempotency tests

tasks.title: Implement forward migration that rewrites legacy approval and clarify record JSON in place and preserves record_id as gate_id
Write .migrated sentinels and .backup snapshots per run so migration is idempotent and reversible
Implement --undo to restore original files from .backup and remove the .migrated sentinel before any post-migration writes
Make GateRecordStore read fail fast with UnmigratedRecordError when a legacy-shaped file is encountered
Add tests for mixed directories, repeated migration runs, unknown record_kind values, and partially corrupted legacy records

bundles.title: Runtime Gate Helpers
bundles.goal: Implement gate issuance and resolution semantics, including supersede, validation, and recovery rules, in the runtime layer.
inputs: design.md Decisions and State Lifecycle sections
outputs: issueGate helper
resolveGate helper
runtime-owned allowed_responses mapping
startup self-heal logic for duplicate pending gates
unit tests for concurrency, rollback, and validation rules

tasks.title: Implement the runtime-owned allowed_responses mapping for approval, clarify, and review_decision gates
Implement issueGate with same gate_kind plus originating_phase concurrency checks, paired supersede and create writes, and event_ids updates
Implement resolveGate with allowed response validation, eligible responder role checks, terminal-state immutability, and resolved metadata writes
Add in-process locking, best-effort rollback, and startup self-healing to reconcile duplicate pending gates after partial failures
Add tests for supersede behavior, invalid response rejection, role mismatch rejection, non-pending response attempts, and rollback semantics

bundles.title: Transition and CLI Gate Adoption
bundles.goal: Replace legacy transition record issuance and CLI wiring with GateRecord-backed behavior without changing run paths.
inputs: transition call sites that emit ApprovalRecord or ClarifyRecord
outputs: transition code paths emitting approval and clarify GateRecord objects
phase gating logic aligned to approval and review_decision blocking rules
CLI and runtime composition using LocalFsGateRecordStore
transition regression tests

tasks.title: Replace ApprovalRecord and ClarifyRecord writes in spec, design, and apply transitions with issueGate inputs and GateRecord payloads
Update phase advancement checks so pending approval and review_decision gates block advancement while clarify gates remain non-blocking by themselves
Switch CLI and runtime injection sites from LocalFsInteractionRecordStore to LocalFsGateRecordStore
Add regression tests proving gate_kind, payload, and on-disk record path semantics match legacy behavior apart from the schema rename

bundles.title: Review Decision Gate Integration
bundles.goal: Emit one review_decision gate per completed review round and link each round summary back to the gate.
outputs: review_decision gate emission in proposal, design, and apply review CLIs
ledger round summaries with gate_id back-references
integration tests for review gate payloads, eligibility, and linkage

tasks.title: Update specflow-challenge-proposal to issue a review_decision gate after each completed proposal challenge round
Update specflow-review-design to issue a review_decision gate carrying review_round_id and findings in the payload
Update specflow-review-apply to issue a review_decision gate carrying review_round_id and findings in the payload
Extend ledger round summary persistence to include gate_id while keeping legacy summaries readable when gate_id is absent
Add tests proving exactly one review_decision gate per round, human-author-only eligibility, and gate_id equality with the ledger round back-reference

bundles.title: Gate Alias Layer and Change Verification
bundles.goal: Preserve surface-event compatibility through the record_id alias layer and complete archive-level verification for the change.
outputs: recordIdForGate compatibility helper
event payloads still emitting record_id derived from gate_id
follow-up tracking hook for alias removal
passing openspec validate and specflow-spec-verify results

tasks.title: Add recordIdForGate that returns gate.gate_id and route surface-event payload construction through the alias helper
Add compatibility tests proving payload.record_id remains present and equals gate.gate_id across updated emitters
Add a follow-up tracking reference for removing the alias from surface-event-contract and workflow-run-state consumers
Run openspec validate and specflow-spec-verify and resolve any remaining consistency issues required for archive readiness
